title: PlumPride Tomateux
description: A rich and dense Filipino dish featuring plum tomatoes, high in protein for a show-off meal.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup heavy cream
ingredients.notes: whole milk can be used as a substitute

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: ensure it is not overheated for safety

instructions: Wash the plum tomatoes thoroughly and chop them into small pieces.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add chopped plum tomatoes and sauté until they start to soften.
Pour in heavy cream and bring it to a simmer. Stir occasionally until the mixture reduces and thickens slightly.
Season with salt if desired and remove from heat. Garnish with fresh basil leaves before serving.
